case_title: WILBERT ANTONIO BAH VS. FUSCOTTI,LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAH, WILBERT ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT FUSCOTTI,LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA MANGAROSA RESTAURANT & BAR JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAH, WILBERT ANTONIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUSCOTTI,LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA MANGAROSA RESTAURANT & BAR $4,708.02 PRINCIPAL, $43.72 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,931.74, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
